description: A psychiatry researcher has collected Spatial Working Memory (SWM) data from 15 patients. During testing, one patient experienced agitation and randomly mashed the touchscreen, resulting in a corrupted log. Parse the trial-by-trial click log at ~/pebl/data/swm_click_logs.csv to compute three metrics for each participant: Between-Search Errors (BSE) (clicking a box that already yielded a token in a previous search of the same trial), Within-Search Errors (WSE) (clicking a box that was already clicked in the current search), and Strategy Score (for 6-box and 8-box trials, the sum of unique boxes chosen for the first click of each search). Exclude any participant whose total WSE across all trials is strictly greater than 5
